mapper.sql: re.re_id as rr_id, re.school, re.education, re.enrollment_time, re.graduation_time, re.new_education_flag, re.specialized_subject, re.enrollment, re.attribute1, re.attribute2, re.attribute3, re.enabled_flag, re.id, re.update_by, re.create_time, re.update_time, re.create_by, re.enrollment_time_new

${tAlias}.re_id as ${tAlias}_rr_id, ${tAlias}.school as ${tAlias}_school, ${tAlias}.education as ${tAlias}_education, ${tAlias}.enrollment_time as ${tAlias}_enrollment_time, ${tAlias}.graduation_time as ${tAlias}_graduation_time, ${tAlias}.new_education_flag as ${tAlias}_new_education_flag, ${tAlias}.specialized_subject as ${tAlias}_specialized_subject, ${tAlias}.enrollment as ${tAlias}_enrollment, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.enrollment_time_new as ${tAlias}_enrollment_time_new
mapper.insert: insert into re_education (re_id, school, education, enrollment_time, graduation_time, new_education_flag, specialized_subject, enrollment, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, update_by, create_time, update_time, create_by,enrollment_time_new) values (#{recruitment.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{school,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{education,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enrollmentTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{graduationTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{newEducationFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{specializedSubject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enrollment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{enrollmentTimeNew,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update re_education set re_id = #{recruitment.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, school = #{school,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, education = #{education,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enrollment_time = #{enrollmentTime,jdbcType=DATE}, graduation_time = #{graduationTime,jdbcType=DATE}, new_education_flag = #{newEducationFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, specialized_subject = #{specializedSubject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enrollment = #{enrollment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
